title: Forgotten Dragons
body:
Embark on an epic journey through the enchanting realms of Minecraft with "Forgotten Dragons," an awe-inspiring mod that introduces a breathtaking fusion of mythical creatures into the game.

Delve into a world where the legends of ancient dragons, forgotten by time, spring to life. These majestic and powerful beings possess a unique blend of elements, each wielding their elemental prowess to awe and inspire adventurers. Encounter fire-breathing wyverns, ice-cold drakes, thundering storm dragons, and more.

 

Are you ready to delve into the rich lore of "Forgotten Dragons" and unlock the secrets of these mythical creatures? Prepare yourself for the adventure of a lifetime as you navigate through a land of wonder, danger, and the awe-inspiring might of ancient dragons

 

Requires Forgotten Mobs and Geckolib 1.19 - 3.1.40 

Requires https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dnd-forgotten-mobs
